diagnosis: Registry ParamDef used 'packet_count' (generating --packet-count CLI flag) but the playbook passes --count; renamed param to 'count' in registry and updated PingOfDeathAttack.__init__ signature to match

files_changed.description: Renamed ParamDef 'packet_count' to 'count' for ping-of-death entry so the CLI generates --count instead of --packet-count
Renamed __init__ parameter from 'packet_count' to 'count' and updated all references within __init__; updated start_ping_of_death_attack() call to pass count= instead of packet_count=
